tooling_sandboxing.detail: Execution is on the host by default with an Auto Approve/YOLO-mode permission system gating file edits, terminal commands, browser actions, and MCP tools; the docs recommend an external sandboxed VM/container for YOLO mode rather than shipping isolation.

context_memory.detail: Team/session state persists across restarts ("pick up where you left off", scheduled runs persist across restarts) beyond a single live process.

lifecycle_hooks.detail: The tool_call_before hook fires before a tool call and can audit or prevent the invocation (policy enforcement, fail_closed mode for unsafe bypass), with tool_call_after logging results afterward.

prompt_optimization.detail: .clinerules files inject project-specific coding standards, architecture conventions, and deployment procedures into how Cline behaves, without automatic tuning.

build_vs_buy.label: blueprint
build_vs_buy.detail: Primary published artifact is the self-hosted VS Code/JetBrains extension and CLI configured via .clinerules and the plugin/hook system; a lower-level programmatic SDK is also offered for tier-1 style composition.
